Schematic"}, {"bbox": [511, 158, 641, 175], "category": "title", "text": "3 Description"}, {"bbox": [509, 182, 909, 229], "category": "text", "text": "The TPS562200 and TPS563200 are simple, easy-to-use, 2-A and 3-A synchronous step-down (buck) converters in 6-pin SOT-23 package."}, {"bbox": [509, 235, 909, 281], "category": "text", "text": "The devices are optimized to operate with minimum external component counts and also optimized to achieve low standby current."}, {"bbox": [509, 288, 909, 395], "category": "text", "text": "These switch mode power supply (SMPS) devices employ with no external compensation components."}, {"bbox": [509, 402, 909, 478], "category": "text", "text": "TPS562200 and TPS563200 operate in Advanced Eco-mode, which maintains high efficiency during light load operation.
